text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, T.M. Opera O receives a fan letter.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This is superb!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold, Trainer! A devout fan has bestowed a
most fitting portrait unto me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me a crayon drawing probably made
by a little kid.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's of T.M. Opera O, for sure... though it looks
more like a tube with ears and a tail. There's also
a bunch of indigo-blue scribbles in the
background.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This sleek, elongated physique. The irresistible
charm of my ears and tail...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think, such a prodigy who can capture my
majestic allure exists!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And... Yes, yes... This indigo must represent outer
space.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My silhouette bounding across the galaxy! This
youth possesses excellent taste!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am duty bound to make their vision a reality!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Have you a regimen to prepare me for
striding through the stars?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah, I am always serious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will rise to meet the hopes and dreams of the
people, no matter what they may be. As with
everything, one doesn't know until one tries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some research, I explain what kinds of
astronaut training would be doable here at
Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But that is no different from our usual
regimen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait! That could mean but one thing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I have been training to reach the stars all along!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! I never miss the mark!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The time to take my first step toward space has
come. I shall see that young girl's wish granted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With eyes unwavering—as usual—T.M. Opera O
declares her new objective.
